name: Roasted Tofu and Okra with Dipping Sauce
recipeIngredient: 1 1/2 lb small okra, rinsed and patted dry
Olive oil spray or olive oil for brushing
1 tbsp chopped lemon grass stalks OR
OR 1/3 tsp lemon or lime zest
recipeInstructions:
1. Cut tofu crosswise into 8 3/4-inch thick slabs, then cut each slab in half lengthwise to yield 16 pieces.
2. Place the tofu between two kitchen towels and put a cutting board on top. Let sit for about 10 minutes, or until excess liquid is absorbed.
3. Combine molasses and mustard in a baking dish. Mix in salt and pepper. Place tofu in marinade and turn to coat on all sides. Cover and marinate in the refrigerator for at least 1 hour.
4. Cut off and discard okra stems. Transfer okra to two baking sheets. Brush with oil, sprinkle with spices and salt if desired, and toss to coat. Set aside.
5. Combine ingredients for the dipping sauce in a small saucepan. Mix well. Cook over very low heat, stirring frequently, until slightly thickened. Set aside.
6. To cook: If using charcoal grill, oil the surface. Place tofu and okra over medium-hot coals and grill, covered, for 10 - 20 minutes, turning once. (If using an oven, preheat to 500°F. Roast oiled okra on a baking sheet, and tofu on an oiled cooling rack resting over a baking sheet for 15 - 25 minutes.)
7. Arrange tofu and okra on a platter with the dipping sauce. Serves 4.
8. Per serving with 1 tbsp sauce: 406 calories; 28g protein; 14g fat; 37g carbs; 0 cholesterol; 478mg sodium; 5g fiber; vegan.
